\tzpentry{ID5650}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5650 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{ij} = \frac{K_0}{N}\,\frac{e^{-|r_i-r_j|/L}}{|r_i-r_j|+\varepsilon}, \qquad K_{p,i} = \kappa_p\,\frac{1}{\big(|r_i-a_p|+\varepsilon\big)^3}, \end{equation}
